# Hash-pinned dependencies for verify-osps-conformance.yml.
#
# Closes Scorecard alert #123 (PinnedDependenciesID) on
# verify-osps-conformance.yml — the previous `pip install pyyaml==6.0.3`
# was version-pinned but not hash-pinned. Installing via this file with
# `--require-hashes` forces pip to verify each downloaded artifact's
# sha256 matches one of the listed hashes before installation.
#
# Hashes sourced from PyPI's pypi.org/pypi/pyyaml/6.0.3/json on
# 2026-05-27 and cross-verified by SHA-256 against the downloaded
# artifacts.
#
# When bumping the pyyaml version, re-fetch hashes from PyPI:
#   curl -s https://pypi.org/pypi/pyyaml/<version>/json | jq '.urls[] |
#     select(.filename | endswith(".tar.gz") or
#       contains("cp312-cp312-manylinux_2_17_x86_64")) |
#     {filename, sha256: .digests.sha256}'
pyyaml==6.0.3 \
    --hash=sha256:ba1cc08a7ccde2d2ec775841541641e4548226580ab850948cbfda66a1befcdc \
    --hash=sha256:d76623373421df22fb4cf8817020cbb7ef15c725b9d5e45f17e189bfc384190f
